summary: Added e2e-setup and e2e-verify targets to init-justfile.md: updated Standard Target Contract table, added verbatim recipe templates for both targets, and updated Step 4 Output Confirmation to list both new targets.
keyDecisions: Used verbatim recipe blocks from tech-design.md Interface 1 and Interface 2 without paraphrasing
Placed e2e-setup and e2e-verify recipe templates between test-e2e and language-specific recipes sections

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Standard Target Contract table contains e2e-setup and e2e-verify rows
e2e-setup recipe template present with set -euo pipefail, package.json check, idempotent node_modules check, playwright install, and success output
e2e-verify recipe template present with [arg("feature", long)], empty-string guard, directory-existence check, grep scan, and correct exit codes
Step 4 Output Confirmation lists both new targets
